title: ‘We’re Trapped in Hell’: Iranians Say Life Is Put On Hold by Months of War
summary_full: Devastated by cycles of violence and economic crisis, many are giving up on work and their futures as the United States batters Iran again.
summary_public: Devastated by cycles of violence and economic crisis, many are giving up on work and their futures as the United States batters Iran again.
